faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our platform

items.question: How do I onboard new drivers to the platform?
items.answer: Our streamlined onboarding process includes document verification, background checks, and training modules. Drivers can complete the entire process through the mobile app in 24-48 hours.

items.question: What are the commission rates for operators?
items.answer: Commission rates are flexible and depend on your fleet size and service area. Contact our sales team for a customized pricing plan that fits your business model.

items.question: Can I set custom pricing for different zones?
items.answer: Yes, our platform supports zone-based pricing, surge pricing, and custom rate cards. You have full control over pricing strategies to maximize revenue.

items.question: How does the driver payment system work?
items.answer: Drivers can choose from multiple payout options including instant pay, daily, or weekly transfers. All transactions are tracked in real-time with detailed earning reports.

items.question: What safety features are included?
items.answer: We provide comprehensive safety features including real-time tracking, SOS buttons, driver verification, trip sharing, and 24/7 support for both drivers and passengers.

items.question: Can I integrate with my existing systems?
items.answer: Yes, Tranzkit offers robust APIs and webhooks for seamless integration with your existing fleet management, accounting, and HR systems.

items.question: What kind of analytics and reporting do you provide?
items.answer: Our analytics dashboard provides real-time insights on fleet utilization, revenue, driver performance, passenger satisfaction, and operational efficiency with exportable reports.

items.question: Is there support for multiple languages?
items.answer: Yes, our platform supports multiple languages including English and Arabic, with more languages being added based on market demand.

brand.tagline: Transform your transportation business with our comprehensive platform.

hero.title: Powerful Apps for Every User
hero.subtitle: Download our suite of mobile and web applications designed for supervisors, drivers, riders, operators, and enterprises. Experience seamless transportation management at your fingertips.

showcase.title: Choose Your App
showcase.subtitle: Select the app that matches your role in the transportation ecosystem

hero.title: Supervisor App
hero.subtitle: Manage operations with precision. Real-time fleet monitoring and operational control for transport supervisors.

supervisor.description: The Supervisor App gives you complete visibility and control over your fleet operations. Monitor vehicles in real-time, manage driver assignments, track performance metrics, and respond to incidents instantly—all from your mobile device.

features.realTimeTrackingDesc: Monitor all vehicles and drivers with live GPS tracking and instant location updates
features.analyticsDesc: Access comprehensive dashboards with key metrics, trends, and operational insights
features.alertsDesc: Receive instant notifications for delays, incidents, route deviations, and critical events
features.teamManagementDesc: Assign tasks, manage schedules, and communicate with your driver team efficiently

hero.title: Driver App
hero.subtitle: Navigate smarter, earn more. Optimized routes and seamless trip management for professional drivers.

driver.description: The Driver App is your essential companion on the road. Get optimized routes, manage your schedule, track earnings, and provide excellent service to passengers—all with an intuitive, easy-to-use interface designed for drivers.

features.smartRoutingDesc: AI-powered navigation with real-time traffic updates and optimal route suggestions
features.scheduleManagementDesc: View your shifts, manage availability, and accept trip assignments seamlessly
features.earningsDesc: Monitor your income in real-time with detailed breakdowns and payment history
features.safetyDesc: Emergency assistance, trip verification, and safety protocols built into every ride

hero.title: Rider App
hero.subtitle: Book rides in seconds. Fast, safe, and reliable transportation whenever you need it.

rider.description: The Rider App makes booking transportation effortless. Request rides instantly, track your driver in real-time, pay securely, and rate your experience—all in a beautifully designed app that puts you in control.

features.quickBookingDesc: Book rides in seconds with smart address suggestions and saved locations
features.liveTrackingDesc: Track your driver's location in real-time with accurate ETAs and route visibility
features.paymentsDesc: Multiple payment options including cards, digital wallets, and corporate accounts
features.supportDesc: Get help anytime with in-app chat support and comprehensive help resources

hero.title: Operator Dashboard
hero.subtitle: Complete fleet control. Comprehensive platform for transport operators to manage and optimize operations.

operatorDashboard.description: The Operator Dashboard provides transport operators with powerful tools to manage fleets, drivers, routes, and finances. Make data-driven decisions with comprehensive analytics, automate operations, and scale your business efficiently.

features.businessIntelligenceDesc: Advanced analytics and reporting tools for strategic decision-making and growth
features.fleetManagementDesc: Complete vehicle lifecycle management, maintenance tracking, and utilization optimization
features.revenueOptimizationDesc: Dynamic pricing, demand forecasting, and revenue management tools
features.complianceDesc: Automated compliance tracking, safety protocols, and regulatory reporting

hero.title: Enterprise Dashboard
hero.subtitle: Corporate mobility management. Streamline employee transportation and logistics for your organization.

enterpriseDashboard.description: The Enterprise Dashboard empowers organizations to manage employee transportation efficiently. Control costs, ensure policy compliance, track usage, and provide seamless mobility solutions for your workforce with enterprise-grade security and reporting.

features.employeeManagementDesc: Centralized employee profiles, ride approvals, and department-level access control
features.costControlDesc: Budget management, spending limits, cost allocation, and detailed expense tracking
features.reportingDesc: Customizable reports, usage analytics, and executive dashboards for informed decisions
features.securityDesc: SSO integration, role-based access, data encryption, and compliance with corporate policies
